// Feature Parade EP01 — 主测试剧本
// 每段对白直接用 [T##] 标注所测功能，测试者播放时对照清单勾选。
// Gate 路由全部指向已存在的 ep 文件，condition 覆盖 5/7（check/rating 是 context-local，不可在 gate 使用，在 T16/T19 验证）。

@episode main:01 "Feature Parade" {

  // ================================================================
  // SCENE 1 — Concurrent group + dialogue kinds + phone messages
  // ================================================================

  @bg set bedroom
  &music play calm
  &malia show phone at left

  NARRATOR: [T1] Concurrent group fired: bg + music_play + char_show (one & group).
  YOU: [T2] YOU internal monologue renders here.
  NARRATOR: [T3] NARRATOR line (separate from dialogue).
  MALIA: [T4] CHARACTER dialogue line from MALIA.

  @phone show {
    @text from EASTON: [T5] phone_show → @text from (incoming, left bubble)
    @text to EASTON: [T6] phone_show → @text to (outgoing, right bubble)
    @text from EASTON: [T7] multiple messages inside one phone_show block
  }
  @phone hide

  MALIA [worried]: [T8] CHARACTER [look]: syntax sugar — changes look AND speaks in one line.

  // ================================================================
  // SCENE 2 — bg transition=fade + bubble types ×9 + pause
  // ================================================================

  @bg set school fade
  &music crossfade upbeat
  &malia look flat
  &josie show excited at right

  NARRATOR: [T9] bg transition=fade + music_crossfade + char_look + char_show (concurrent).

  NARRATOR: [T10] Watch 9 bubbles fire in order below (heart/anger/sweat/question/exclaim/idea/music/doom/ellipsis).
  @josie bubble heart
  @josie bubble anger
  @josie bubble sweat
  @josie bubble question
  @josie bubble exclaim
  @josie bubble idea
  @josie bubble music
  @josie bubble doom
  @josie bubble ellipsis

  NARRATOR: [T11] @pause for 2 — expect TWO clicks to advance past this line.
  @pause for 2

  // ================================================================
  // SCENE 3 — bg transition=cut + char_move + char_hide transition + sfx
  // ================================================================

  @bg set hallway cut
  &josie move to left
  &mauricio show smirk at right
  &sfx play bell

  NARRATOR: [T12] bg transition=cut + char_move + new char_show + sfx_play (concurrent).
  MAURICIO: [T13] Dialogue from right side of the stage.
  @josie hide fade
  NARRATOR: [T14] char_hide with transition=fade — Josie should fade out.

  // ================================================================
  // SCENE 4 — bg transition=slow + minigame with rating branches (4 档)
  // ================================================================

  @bg set classroom slow
  &music crossfade tense
  &malia look flat
  &mauricio look angry

  NARRATOR: [T15] bg transition=slow + music_crossfade + char_look×2 (concurrent).

  NARRATOR: [T16] @minigame parking_rush with 4 rating branches — engine picks one based on play result.
  @minigame parking_rush ATK "Malia dashes through a cramped parking lot before the bell rings" {
    @if (rating.S) {
      NARRATOR: [T16a] rating.S branch hit (context-local condition).
    } @else @if (rating.A || rating.B) {
      NARRATOR: [T16b] rating.A || rating.B compound branch hit.
    } @else @if (rating.C) {
      NARRATOR: [T16c] rating.C branch hit.
    } @else {
      NARRATOR: [T16d] rating fallback @else branch hit.
    }
  }

  // ================================================================
  // SCENE 5 — @choice (brave + check, safe) + all state directives
  // ================================================================

  @bg set cafeteria fade
  &music crossfade lunch
  &mark show grin at right
  &malia look flat

  MARK: [T17] Set up: a @choice block follows with a brave + a safe option.
  @sfx play crowd
  @easton show hopeful at right
  &mark hide

  NARRATOR: [T18] Option A uses check(CHA, dc=12). Option B is safe (no check).

  @choice {
    @option A brave "[T19-brave] Face Easton (tests brave option + check block)." {
      check {
        attr: CHA
        dc: 12
      }
      @if (check.success) {
        NARRATOR: [T19a] check.success branch hit (context-local condition).
        @easton look relieved
        EASTON: Can I sit?
        MALIA: Two minutes.
        @affection easton +2
        NARRATOR: [T20a] @affection +2 applied.
        &butterfly "Accepted Easton openly at lunch"
        NARRATOR: [T20b] @butterfly recorded.
        @signal mark EP01_FACED_EASTON
        NARRATOR: [T20c] @signal mark EP01_FACED_EASTON written to flag store.
        @achievement EYE_CONTACT {
          name: "Eye Contact"
          rarity: uncommon
          description: "Didn't look away."
        }
        NARRATOR: [T21a] @achievement rarity=uncommon unlocked.
      } @else {
        NARRATOR: [T19b] check.fail branch hit.
        @easton look hurt
        MALIA: Not today.
        @affection easton -1
        NARRATOR: [T20d] @affection -1 (negative delta) applied.
        &butterfly "Lost nerve facing Easton"
      }
    }
    @option B safe "[T22-safe] Have Mark intervene (tests safe option, no check)." {
      @mark show grin at right
      &easton hide fade
      MARK: MOVE ALONG, lover boy!
      @mark bubble music
      &butterfly "Had Mark deflect Easton"
      @signal mark EP01_DEFLECTED
      NARRATOR: [T22a] Safe path executed — EP01_DEFLECTED flag set.
    }
  }

  // ================================================================
  // SCENE 6 — top-level @if with compound / comparison / flag + CG
  // ================================================================

  @bg set gym fade
  &music crossfade ambient
  &malia look flat

  NARRATOR: [T23] Top-level @if chain with compound(comparison && flag) / compound(comparison || flag) / @else.
  @if (affection.easton >= 2 && EP01_FACED_EASTON) {
    YOU: [T23a] compound (comparison && flag) true.
    @malia bubble heart
  } @else @if (affection.easton < 0 || EP01_DEFLECTED) {
    YOU: [T23b] compound (comparison || flag) true.
    @malia bubble doom
  } @else {
    YOU: [T23c] fallback @else.
    @malia bubble ellipsis
  }

  NARRATOR: [T24] @cg show window_stare fade with duration=medium, content, and 2 body steps.
  @cg show window_stare fade {
    duration: medium
    content: "Wide shot pushes in as Malia stands at the gym window, late sunlight cutting through dust."
    NARRATOR: [T24a] NARRATOR line inside CG body.
    YOU: [T24b] YOU line inside CG body.
  }

  // ================================================================
  // SCENE 7 — influence condition + engine value comparison + music_fadeout
  // ================================================================

  @bg set bedroom fade
  &music crossfade night
  &malia show phone at left

  NARRATOR: [T25] @if with influence condition (LLM-judged at runtime).
  @if (influence "Player repeatedly chose kindness toward Easton") {
    @phone show {
      @text from EASTON: [T25a] influence=true branch reached.
    }
    @phone hide
    @affection easton +1
  }

  NARRATOR: [T26] @if chain with comparison on ENGINE VALUE (san), not affection.
  @if (san <= 20) {
    YOU: [T26a] san <= 20 branch.
  } @else @if (san >= 80) {
    YOU: [T26b] san >= 80 branch.
  } @else {
    YOU: [T26c] san middle branch.
  }

  NARRATOR: [T27] @music fadeout — music should fade to silence.
  @music fadeout
  @malia look shocked

  MAURICIO [eyebrow_raise]: [T28] CHARACTER [look]: syntax sugar, second instance (Mauricio changes look + speaks).
  @butterfly "Accepted Mauricio calling her Butterfly again"
  @signal mark EP01_COMPLETE
  NARRATOR: [T28a] EP01_COMPLETE flag set — read by ep02's gate.

  // ================================================================
  // GATE ROUTING PREVIEW — 在真正 @gate 之前，用镜像 @if 链把即将跳转的目的地"叫出来"，方便测试者人眼对照
  // ================================================================
  NARRATOR: [T29] Gate routing preview — conditions evaluated top-to-bottom; the FIRST match decides @next target.

  @if (A.fail) {
    NARRATOR: [T29a → main/bad/001:01] choice condition A.fail matched → will jump to bad01.md
  } @else @if (EP01_DEFLECTED) {
    NARRATOR: [T29b → main/bad/001:01] flag condition EP01_DEFLECTED matched → will jump to bad01.md
  } @else @if (affection.easton < 0) {
    NARRATOR: [T29c → main/bad/001:01] comparison affection.easton < 0 matched → will jump to bad01.md
  } @else @if (EP01_COMPLETE && affection.easton >= 3) {
    NARRATOR: [T29d → main/route/easton:01] compound (flag && comparison) matched → will jump to cont01.md
  } @else @if (influence "Player showed consistent kindness") {
    NARRATOR: [T29e → main/route/easton:01] influence matched → will jump to cont01.md
  } @else {
    NARRATOR: [T29f → main/stress:01] no condition matched, fallback @else → will jump to stress.md (then stress's own gate will fall through to ep02.md)
  }

  // 真正的 gate（与上方预告逻辑完全一致，条件顺序 1:1 对应）
  @gate {
    @if (A.fail):
      @next main/bad/001:01
    @else @if (EP01_DEFLECTED):
      @next main/bad/001:01
    @else @if (affection.easton < 0):
      @next main/bad/001:01
    @else @if (EP01_COMPLETE && affection.easton >= 3):
      @next main/route/easton:01
    @else @if (influence "Player showed consistent kindness"):
      @next main/route/easton:01
    @else:
      @next main/stress:01
  }
}
